header.title: Products
header.subtitle: Generated reports, notes, and deliverables
baselines.title: Product Baselines
baselines.description: Jinja-compatible baselines define repeatable report structures. CaddyAI can render these with investigation notes, IOCs, evidence, timelines, and analyst-provided fields.
baselines.empty: Import a product baseline package to make it available to CaddyAI and product rendering.
baseline.importError: Failed to import product baseline package.
baseline.docxRenderError: Failed to render DOCX from the attached baseline template.
products.heading: Generated Products
empty.noProductsDesc: Ask CaddyAI to render a product baseline to create a draft report here.
empty.noMatchDesc: Try a product title, tag, or phrase from the draft.
manager.title: Product Baselines
manager.copyPromptText: Use the "{{name}}" product baseline to render a finished product for the active investigation. Keep it customer-ready, preserve source notes, and create the product as a tagged product note.
manager.docxTemplateNotes: Attached DOCX template used for baseline-backed product export.
preview.title: Product Preview
